subcodes.first_line: O ye two pure servants of the Best Beloved! My fervent hope is that these two blessed souls may become as two shining candles and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده پاک جان جانان مرا آرزو چنان که آن دو نفس مبارک دو شمع تابان گردند و
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @being a source of light; guidance
